MM/DD/YYYY
 SCHI_MEDICAID_EVER Schizophrenia - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 SCHI_MEDICARE_EVER Schizophrenia - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 SCHIOT_COMBINED Schizophrenia and Other Psychotic Disorders - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 SCHIOT_MEDICAID Schizophrenia and Other Psychotic Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims
